overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage transitioning from a pedestrian corporate plaza with holographic advertisements and palm trees to high-speed driving beneath elevated neon-lit expressways. The scene features futuristic architecture with cyan neon lighting and towering skyscrapers throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with holographic advertisements and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through landscaped corporate plaza beneath circular neon structure, passing between palm trees and hedges

entered.detail: large circular architectural canopy with glowing cyan neon patterns and digital displays
tall vertical holographic advertisement displaying woman in business attire
tall palm trees arranged in clusters throughout the plaza
well-manicured green hedges lining the walkway
towering glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic corporate plaza beneath a massive circular structure adorned with cyan neon lights. Tall holographic billboards display advertisements on either side as the camera walks forward through landscaped greenery featuring palm trees and trimmed hedges. The background reveals a dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers against the night sky.

events.description: transition from pedestrian plaza to vehicle driving on highway under elevated expressways
camera shifts from walking pace to driving speed approximately 60 km/h
vehicle passes by in adjacent lane on the right

agents.ego_description: driving vehicle along multi-lane highway beneath elevated expressways, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: futuristic car overtaking in the right lane, red taillights visible

entered.detail: massive concrete expressway overpass with multiple levels and support pillars
glowing digital billboards and neon strips mounted on the underside of the elevated highway
wide asphalt highway with multiple lanes marked by glowing lane dividers
tall concrete divider separating highway lanes with teal illuminated strips

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a high-speed drive along a multi-lane highway beneath massive elevated expressways. The camera moves steadily forward under the concrete overpasses, which feature glowing neon advertisements on their undersides. Futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated facades line the left side of the highway while other vehicles occasionally pass by in adjacent lanes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a pedestrian corporate plaza into a high-speed drive through a neon-lit urban corridor. It begins by walking forward beneath a massive circular structure adorned with cyan neon lights, passing through landscaped greenery and palm trees flanked by towering holographic billboards. As the camera advances toward the dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers in the distance, the perspective shifts seamlessly into a rapid forward motion along a multi-lane highway. The scene then expands beneath massive concrete overpasses featuring glowing advertisements on their undersides, with futuristic skyscrapers lining the route as other vehicles streak past in adjacent lanes.
